action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with no files. Analysis: This is a domain generalization task (train on L38, L43, L46, test on L100) with 10 wildlife classes. Key challenges: (1) domain shift, (2) class imbalance (raccoon ~52%, opossum ~20%). Strategy: Use DINOv2 ViT-B/14 as backbone (strong features), add a classifier head, train with class-weighted loss to handle imbalance. Start with a simple baseline to validate pipeline and measure iteration time. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py, then train for 5 epochs to get baseline.
